footer.tagline: Senior interview prep · study guide. Read it, drill it, say it out loud, repeat.
flashcard.hint: Grade a card → it reschedules. Drill Due daily.
flashcard.none: 🎉 Nothing due in this filter. Come back tomorrow, or turn off Due to keep drilling.
flashcard.gradeLabel: How well did you know it?
daily.cardsDue: {n} cards due · today's set: {cards} cards + {prompts} prompts
daily.noCards: 🎉 No cards due right now — you're ahead. Browse the full flashcard deck or do a practice prompt.
search.placeholder: Search by keyword — or enable AI for hybrid meaning + keyword search…
search.loading.first: (first run downloads the model; then cached)
search.hybrid: 🧠 Hybrid AI search · {device} · on your device
search.error: On-device AI isn't supported here — keyword search active
search.noMatches: No matches. Try fewer or broader words.
ai.unavailable.title: On-device AI tutor isn't available in this browser.
ai.unavailable.body: It uses Chrome's built-in Prompt API (Gemini Nano), which runs the model fully on your device — no key, no cloud. It needs a recent desktop Chrome with supported hardware. The AI semantic search above works in any modern browser.
ai.preset.explainQ: Explain this like I'm a junior engineer, in 3 sentences.
ai.preset.followupQ: Ask me one tough follow-up interview question about this, then wait.
ai.preset.whyQ: Why does this matter in a senior interview? One short paragraph.
ai.error: Sorry — the on-device model couldn't respond. It may still be downloading, or this device isn't supported.
progress.tools.title: Back up your progress
progress.tools.body: Everything (grades, spaced-repetition schedule, quiz answers, practice, streak) lives in this browser. Export it to move devices or before clearing site data.
progress.tools.invalid: That file didn't look like a valid progress export.
